subject_line: Arjun, your next chapter starts with us
preview_text: A 12-month fee waiver awaits as you relocate—let’s make this transition seamless, together.
body:
Dear Arjun,

Nine years is a long time, and it’s been our privilege to stand with you through every milestone. I understand that a job change and relocation bring both excitement and a fair share of to-dos, and I want to ensure your banking is one less thing to worry about.

To make your transition effortless, I’ve arranged an exclusive full fee waiver on your PCOP relationship for the next 12 months—worth INR 25,000. This means uninterrupted premium service and zero banking charges while you settle into your new city.

This waiver is reserved for you and must be activated before the end of this month. May I suggest a quick call this week to confirm this and update your contact preferences? Your trust over these nine years means everything, and I look forward to being your anchor during this move.

Warmly,
Rohit Mehta
Relationship Manager, PCOP

ab_variant.subject_line: Arjun, your PCOP loyalty reward awaits
ab_variant.preview_text: Exclusive for HNW members like you

subject_line: Priya, your loyalty deserves more than just thanks
preview_text: A special waiver for your 5 years with us—let’s talk before it slips away
body:
Dear Priya,

Five years ago, you chose PCOP. That decision has shaped us, and I want to honor it with something tangible—not just warm words.

For the next few days, I’ve reserved an exclusive 6-month fee waiver on your banking relationship, worth INR 8,000. It’s our way of saying thank you for your steadfast trust. No forms, no fine print—just a direct credit that keeps your experience seamless and rewarding.

This is a time-sensitive gesture, crafted specifically for our most valued relationships. I’d hate for you to miss it because the window is closing soon.

Would you like me to activate it right now? Simply reply with “Yes, Priya” and I’ll take care of the rest personally.

Warmly,
Amit Verma
Your Relationship Manager, PCOP

subject_line: Vikram, our gratitude for 15 remarkable years
preview_text: A token of appreciation worth INR 25,000, crafted exclusively for you.
body:
Dear Mr. Desai,

Few relationships span a decade and a half, and yours is one we deeply treasure. For 15 years, you have placed your trust in PCOP, and it has been our privilege to serve you.

As a gesture of our gratitude, we are delighted to extend a 12-month fee waiver on your banking relationship, valued at INR 25,000. This is a small acknowledgment of the quiet confidence you have shown in us, with no action required from your end—it will reflect automatically in the coming days.

In a world of constant change, your continued presence reminds us of what truly matters: consistency, trust, and a partnership that endures. Should you ever wish to discuss your portfolio or any evolving needs, I remain entirely at your disposal.

With sincere appreciation,
[Name]
Your Relationship Manager, PCOP

opening: It's good to see you, Meera. I want to start by saying we were so sorry to hear about your loss, and please know we’re here to support you, not just as your bank but as a steady presence, just as we have been for the last 20 years.
talking_points: We’ve been reviewing your relationship to ensure your portfolio is perfectly aligned with your current needs. With that in mind, we’d like to offer you a comprehensive fee waiver for the next 12 months, valued at INR 25,000. This is a gesture to provide some financial breathing room, with no action needed from you.

Given this transition, our priority is ensuring your portfolio reflects any new priorities and long-term security. I can walk you through a few options that offer capital preservation and steady income, entirely at your comfort.

We’ve also assigned a dedicated service manager to you, so you have a single, direct point of contact for any banking or documentation needs, bypassing any queues or general helplines. We want to make sure this is one less thing for you to worry about.

subject_line: Rajesh, our appreciation for your 11 years with us
preview_text: As a gesture of gratitude, please accept a full-year fee waiver worth INR 25,000 on your account.
body:
Dear Mr. Verma,

I hope this note finds you well. As your Relationship Manager, I had the pleasure of reviewing your journey with PCOP, and it is truly humbling to see a relationship spanning over eleven years—one built on trust, consistency, and shared growth.

There is no immediate milestone prompting this message, only a genuine desire to honor your loyalty. With that in mind, I have arranged a 12-month complete fee waiver worth INR 25,000 on your banking relationship with us. This waiver has already been reserved for you and requires no action on your part—it is simply our way of saying thank you.

Rajesh, clients like you remind us why we take pride in what we do. Should you ever wish to discuss your portfolio, explore new opportunities, or share feedback, my calendar is always open to you.

With warm regards and deep appreciation,
Amita Desai
Relationship Manager, PCOP

subject_line: Amrita, an exclusive waiver for your 6 years with us
preview_text: Your loyalty deserves more than just thanks. A time-sensitive INR 8,000 benefit awaits.
body:
Dear Amrita,

Six years is a long time, and it’s been our privilege to have you grow with PCOP. Your trust forms the quiet backbone of our community, and today, I want to honor that.

As a gesture of pure gratitude—not a promotion—I’ve reserved a complete fee waiver worth INR 8,000 on your relationship for the next 6 months. There are no hidden conditions, no minimum balances to maintain; simply a seamless continuation of the service you value, at no cost.

This waiver is active for a very limited window and is designed exclusively for a select few who, like you, have been with us for years. I would hate for you to miss it.

Let’s secure this for you. Just reply to this email or call me directly, and I’ll personally ensure it’s applied to your account before the window closes.

Warmly,
Vikram Sharma
Your Relationship Manager, PCOP

subject_line: Simran, a special thank-you for your 7 years with us
preview_text: An exclusive fee waiver worth ₹8,000 awaits you — but only for the next few days.
body:
Dear Simran,

Seven years ago, you placed your trust in PCOP — and that trust has shaped the way we serve you. As a valued member of our Mass Affluent family, your loyalty deserves more than just a thank-you.

That’s why I’ve reserved an exclusive 6-month fee waiver worth ₹8,000 on your account. This is a time-sensitive gesture, crafted only for a handful of long-standing relationships like ours. But I must mention — this waiver can only be activated if claimed within the next few days.

No forms, no hassle. Simply reply to this email or call me directly, and I’ll ensure it reflects in your account right away.

Simran, it’s been a privilege to support you all these years. Let’s make sure this benefit doesn’t slip away.

Warmly,
Your Relationship Manager
PCOP

subject_line: Aditya, our thanks for 13 years of trust
preview_text: To show our appreciation, we're waiving your next 12 months of banking fees—worth INR 25,000.
body:
Dear Aditya,

I was reviewing your portfolio today and wanted to reach out personally. Thirteen years is a significant milestone, and on behalf of everyone at PCOP, thank you for the trust you’ve placed in us since 2011.

As a gesture of our appreciation for your continued relationship, we’ve proactively arranged a full waiver of your banking fees for the next 12 months, valued at INR 25,000. This will reflect automatically on your account—no action is needed from your end.

Your loyalty has been instrumental in shaping our premium banking experience, and I look forward to serving you in the years ahead. If there’s anything at all I can do to enhance your banking experience, please don’t hesitate to call me directly.

Warm regards,
[Name]
Relationship Manager, PCOP
